author: m.kalinin
content:
> This is due to current limitations on PTC members to track all shufflings to see in which branch they need to attest. Given that we have a different situation with PTC than attesters, I think we should solve this (at least on Prysm we do ) and do send attestations on the different shufflings that we are members of.

Should this be reflected in the spec then? Also, with the current gossip rules it won't be possible to propagate two PTC votes with the same validator index

author: m.kalinin
content:
> The situation in which nodes disagree on the payload status on top of the head root happens if we do increase the gas limit enough so as to payloads not being executable in the alloted time.

Such a gas limit would be harmful not only because of the attestation capacity limitation, right?

author: potuz
content: Yes, this has nothing to do with attestation capacity, but it's a safety concern as any builder can cause an ex-ante reorg
